category_sources: Official GI-DocGen docs describe it as a document generator for GObject-based libraries.
source_facts.description says it is a documentation tool for GObject-based libraries.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Pages site is the GI-DocGen documentation home.
Official tutorial documents usage and project configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from the official GNOME GitLab project URL indicated by source_facts.homepage and official GI-DocGen documentation references.
tags_sources: Official docs explain GI-DocGen generates API references from GObject introspection data.
source_facts.description says documentation tool for GObject-based libraries.
